description: Creates a plane in 3D space through three non-collinear points.
utility: Create a plane through three points in 3D space

arguments.name: point3
arguments.description: Third point on the plane (must not be collinear with the first two)

alternates.description: Plane through three inline point definitions
Plane through three previously defined point3d variables

examples.scenario: Plane through intercept points on each axis
examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
A = point3d(G, 1, 0, 0)
B = point3d(G, 0, 1, 0)
C = point3d(G, 0, 0, 1)
pl = pointsplane3d(G, A, B, C)

examples.scenario: Plane through three arbitrary points with styling
examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
pl = pointsplane3d(G, point3d(G, 2, 0, 0), point3d(G, 0, 3, 0), point3d(G, 0, 0, 4), fc(lightgreen), fo(0.2))
